content:
What is the bar to be considered Ethereum compliant EL zk guest program?
- eels test suite passing
- integrated with benchmarks

anything else?

author: kevaundray
content: Bar for Ethereum compliant EL zk guest program

author: jsign
content:
New release of `projects/zkevm`: [zkevm@v0.4.1](https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/releases/tag/tests-zkevm%40v0.4.1)
Summary:
- Based on `bal-devnet-7` ([bal@v7.2.0](https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/releases/tag/tests-bal%40v7.2.0))
- Add `engine-witness` simulator and `executionWitnessMutated` field.
- Include `blockchain_test_engine` format as part of the release artefact
TL;DR: mostly rebasing and testing-framework related changes -- no `executionWitness` nor `stateless{Input|Output}Bytes` important changes.

More info in [release description](https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/releases/tag/tests-zkevm%40v0.4.1).
